ValidationRule.description: This VR will require shipping information to be filled out completely for Genetic Test record types that require shipping
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISNEW()), RecordType.Name == 'Genetic Testing', Requires_Shipping__c = TRUE, OR( ISBLANK(Shipping_Street_Address__c), ISBLANK(Shipping_City__c), ISBLANK(Shipping_State__c), ISBLANK(Shipping_Country__c), ISBLANK(Shipping_Zip_Code__c) ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please ensure all shipping information is filled out for this Genetic Testing Opportunity.
